scene_title: Chip Neuralink implantado na testa com bordas da marca da besta
narrative_beat: Chip luminoso dourado acima da sobrancelha em carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid human forehead with implanted Neuralink chip in luminous gold above eyebrow with visible connections and pulsing blue-gold light surrounded by crimson biblical mark of the beast medieval border engravings in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the luminous Neuralink chip on the forehead pulsing blue-gold surrounded by crimson medieval engravings
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated surgical room with strong grey lights in background
props: crimson mark of the beast medieval borders

environment.atmosphere: the mark on the forehead literal

composition.foreground: forehead chip in vivid gold crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, blue-gold metallic highlights

mood.emotion: Neuralink in the forehead — Revelation 13:16 deployed in neurosurgery

symbolism.primary: the chip on the forehead as the most literal fulfillment of the mark
symbolism.secondary: medieval engravings as the ancient text commenting on the modern implant

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
